whatIs.title: What is Wegovy & How Does It Work?
whatIs.desc1: Wegovy (semaglutide) is a revolutionary FDA-approved medication designed specifically for chronic weight management. It mimics a natural hormone called GLP-1 that regulates appetite and food intake.
whatIs.desc1Plain: Wegovy (semaglutide) is a revolutionary FDA-approved medication designed specifically for chronic weight management. It mimics a natural hormone called GLP-1 that regulates appetite and food intake.
whatIs.desc2: By activating GLP-1 receptors in the brain, Wegovy helps you feel fuller faster, reduces cravings, and supports sustainable weight loss when combined with a healthy lifestyle.

benefits.title: Benefits That Transform Lives
benefits.item1Desc: Clinical studies show average weight loss of 15-22% of body weight with consistent use.
benefits.item2Desc: Natural appetite suppression reduces cravings and helps you feel satisfied with less food.
benefits.item3Desc: Improves insulin sensitivity and metabolic health for better overall wellness.
benefits.item4Desc: Simple once-weekly injection that fits seamlessly into your busy lifestyle.
benefits.item5Desc: Rigorously tested and approved by FDA for safe, effective weight management.
benefits.item6Desc: Personalized treatment plans supervised by experienced medical professionals.

faq.q1: Is Wegovy safe for weight loss in Malaysia?
faq.a1: Yes, Wegovy is prescribed under medical guidance in Malaysia and is considered safe for most adults. Our doctors conduct thorough assessments before prescribing.
faq.q2: Can I get Wegovy without diabetes?
faq.a2: Yes! Wegovy is specifically designed for weight loss, even if you do not have diabetes. It's approved for chronic weight management in eligible adults.
faq.a3: Mild side effects include nausea and tiredness, which typically improve over time. More serious but rare side effects may include pancreatitis or gallbladder issues.
faq.q4: How fast can I lose weight with Wegovy?
faq.a4: Many people see changes in 2–4 weeks. Results improve significantly with healthy eating and regular exercise. Individual results vary.
faq.a5: It's a weekly pen injection in the stomach, thigh, or upper arm. Our medical team will provide complete training and ongoing support.
